metadata.description: Cogniva's plugin suite for general-purpose development and project management

plugins.name: cogniva-dev
plugins.description: Cogniva's development toolkit: auto-doc, backlog, repo-init, feature lifecycle (plan-feature, execute-feature, quick-fix) with ledger-based worktree cleanup (cleanup-work, cleanup-allwork), module-deps, and status roll-ups

plugins.name: cogniva-skills
plugins.description: Cogniva's general-purpose toolkit: glossary, reference, and project-requirement skills for any project
